seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Casuarinas and West End. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Casuarinas vs West End: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Casuarinas and West End.
heading: West Casuarinas vs West End — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Casuarinas, Western Australia and West End, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Casuarinas has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to West End (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Casuarinas or West End safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Casuarinas has a flood risk score of 22/100, while West End scores 20/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Casuarinas scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. West End scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Casuarinas or West End?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Casuarinas has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
